content:
# Sorption Kinetics

**Summary**: The study of the rate at which a substance is adsorbed onto a surface.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] performed kinetic studies to determine the rates of Cd(II) adsorption.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] Determined the speed and mechanism of cadmium removal from water.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] Analyzed using pseudo-first and second-order models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Pseudo first and second order models were used to describe the sorption kinetics. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 79]])
